name: Marine Air Conditioning
metaDescription: Discover how Parker Air Solutions delivered a 13-unit overhaul for the Riverside Resolute. Expert marine HVAC servicing and installations in SE Queensland.
blogTitle: Marine Air Conditioning Service Queensland: The Riverside Resolute Overhaul
heroHeader: Comfort You Can Count On, Even in the Harshest Marine Environments.
heroParagraph: Standard air conditioning fails at sea. Salt, vibration, and engine heat demand a specialist approach. We recently took on the Riverside Resolute to prove why certified workmanship is the only choice for Queensland mariners.
excerpt: Parker Air Solutions completes a massive 13-unit marine HVAC service and changeover aboard the Riverside Resolute, ensuring reliability for the captain and crew.
